name: Old Fashioned Hermits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, salt, raisins, and chopped walnuts.
2. In another bowl, cream the shortening, sugar, packed brown sugar, and eggs until well combined.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just blended.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a greased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 12 minutes or until lightly browned.
